menu.title: Main menu:
menu.changeLanguagePickGroup: Pick a community first (use “Switch group”) to change the language for that community.
menu.changeLanguageFailed: Could not open the language picker. Please try again.

groupWelcome.ready:
Welcome!

Tap “{chatBot}” to use the menu in a private chat with the bot.
groupWelcome.notReady:
Welcome!

The venue is not set up yet. Admin: run /setup.

group.botAddedIntro:
Hello! All menu actions happen in a private chat with the bot.

Admin: run /setup in this group (next steps in DM).
group.startInGroupHint: The bot menu is available in private messages. Tap “{chatBot}” and open a private chat with me.

book.pickNumberFromList: Pick a number from the list.
book.noMatchingDuration: No matching duration right now. Choose another day.
book.askLookingForPartners: Looking for partners for this booking?
book.noResourcesAskAdmin: No bookable venues. Ask an admin to run /setup.
book.myBookingsEmpty: No unfinished bookings in this chat.
book.myBookingsIntro: Your unfinished bookings — tap a row with date and time to cancel:
book.freeSlotsEmpty: No one is looking for partners for upcoming games in this group right now.
book.freeSlotsIntro: Open spots — tap a row to join the game (the list will refresh):
book.platformNotConfigured: The platform is not set up or there are no active venues. Admin: /setup.
book.venueNotConfigured: Venue is not set up or there are no active courts. Admin: /setup.
book.groupNotConfigured: This group is not set up yet. Admin: /setup in the group.
book.slotTaken: This slot was just taken. Pick another time.
book.bookingWindowClosed: Outside the booking window for participants. Try later or contact an admin.
book.dailyLimitExceeded: Daily booking limit exceeded in this group. Pick another day or shorten the duration.
book.noDurationForThisSlot: No matching duration for this start time. Pick another day.
book.timeSlotInPastPickDay: This time has already passed. Pick another day.
book.listCancelNotFound: Booking was not found or is already cancelled.
book.askPlayersCount: How many people are you looking for? Enter a whole number from 1 to 50.
book.playersCountInvalid: Enter a whole number from 1 to 50.
book.createBookingFailed: Could not create the booking. Please try again.

msg.noSlotsBookingWindow: Booking is not available right now.

rules.welcomeIntro:
Welcome! Please read the community rules before you start.

After reading, tap the accept button below the last message.

—
rules.openBotForRules: To read and confirm the rules, open the bot in a private chat and tap Start.
rules.languagePickerIntro: Choose your preferred language / Оберіть бажану мову:
rules.chooseLanguageInDm: Оберіть мову в приватному повідомленні від бота / Choose language in the bot DM.
rules.rulesSentToDmPing: Community rules were sent to you in a private message from the bot. Open the chat with the bot (tap Start if needed) and confirm using the button below.

onboarding.needLanguageRulesDm: First choose your language and accept the community rules in the bot chat (buttons were sent in DM or in the group).
onboarding.needLanguageRulesGroup: First choose your language and accept the community rules (buttons in DM or in the group).
onboarding.needLanguageRulesGroupShort: First choose your language and accept the community rules (buttons in DM or in the group).

dm.cannotWriteOpenStart: I cannot DM you. Open a chat with me, tap Start, then tap “Bot chat” in the group again.
dm.cannotWriteOpenStartShort: I cannot DM you. Open a chat with me, tap Start, and try again.
dm.noGroupsFound: No groups found. Add the bot to a group or tap “Bot chat” in the group you need.
dm.pickGroupHint: Pick the group to use for actions:

setup.hubHint: «{venues}» — venues, «{groupRules}» — rules text for new members, «{allBookings}» — view bookings in the group, «{linkExisting}» — link an existing venue, «{bookingWindow}» — when members can book, «{bookingLimit}» — per-user hours per weekday.
setup.dmSessionIntroParagraph: Group settings for «{title}». From now on, write only here — group members will not see these messages.
setup.step1NewResource:
Step 1/{stepMax}: How should the new venue be named in the bot?

Send one message with the name (non-empty, up to 200 characters).
setup.step1FromChatTitle:
Step 1/{stepMax}: How should this venue be named in the bot?
The Telegram chat title is «{chatTitle}»; you can replace it using the button below.

Send your name in a message or tap a button.
setup.step1RenameExisting:
Step 1/{stepMax}: How should this venue be named in the bot?
It is currently named «{existingName}» in the bot.

Send a new name in a message or tap «{keepBotName}» to leave the bot name unchanged.
setup.step2AddressWithCurrent:
Step 2/{stepMax}: venue address — shown in parentheses next to the name when picking.
Currently in the bot: «{current}».

Send a new address in a message, «{keepAddress}» or «{noAddress}» to remove the address.
setup.step2AddressEmpty:
Step 2/{stepMax}: venue address (optional — in parentheses next to the name).
No address is set yet.

Send a text message or tap «{noAddress}» to skip.
setup.wizardAlreadyOpen: Setup is already open — reply to the wizard above or tap {cancel}.
setup.adminOnly: Only an administrator can open settings.
setup.noLanguagesInDb: No languages found. Add rows to the languages table.
setup.pickNumberOrNew: Pick a number from the list or tap “{newResource}”.
setup.limitHoursPrompt: Pick a limit (hours per user on this day) or «{unlimited}»:
setup.whPerDayStartPrompt: {day}: choose slot start time (nearest allowed slot start).
setup.whPerDayEndPrompt: {day}: what end time should everything finish (opening: {hour}:00)?
setup.whPerDaySaved: Saved: {day} — slots from {start}:00. Pick another day or «{done}».
setup.continueInDmOnly: Continue setup in private messages with me — replies are not shown in the group.
setup.openSetupFailedFromGroup: Could not open settings. Try again from the group: /setup.
setup.openSetupFailedRetry: Could not open settings. Please try again.
setup.pickOptionFromList: Pick an option from the list.
setup.limitHoursLongIntro: Maximum booking hours per account on this weekday, per venue. Checks use the weekday and calendar start date in that venue’s time zone.
setup.persistSetupFailed: Could not save settings. Please try again.
setup.persistSetupFailedRetryGroup: Could not save settings. Run /setup in the group again.

freeSlot.gameFull: This game is full or the slot is no longer available.
freeSlot.listStale: The list was outdated and has been refreshed. Pick a slot again:
freeSlot.joinedNoMoreOpenings: You are on the roster. Game details were sent in a private message. There are no more open spots for this listing.
freeSlot.joinedSeeDmOrMenu: You are on the roster. When and where to meet — in a private message from me. You can pick another open spot or «Main menu»:

slotDm.peopleYou: From your side we count 1 person (you).
slotDm.peopleMany: From your side we count {n} people.
slotDm.addressUnknown: not specified — ask the organizer in the group

whDm.allDaysUnchanged: OK — all weekdays stay as saved.
whDm.noAdmin: You are not an administrator in this group.
whDm.pickWeekdayPreamble: Pick a weekday (Mon = Monday). Changes save immediately.
whDm.skipOrPerDayFirst: First tap «Skip» or «Set hours by weekday».
whDm.pickDayOrDone: Pick a day with a button or «Done — menu».
whDm.dayClosedSaved: Saved: closed day. Pick another day or «Done — menu».
whDm.dayRowHint: «Closed» — no slots. «Set hours» — same as in /setup.
whDm.tapBottomButton: Tap one of the buttons below.
whDm.pickOpeningByButtons: Pick opening time using the buttons (00:00–22:00).
whDm.pickEndByButtons: Pick end time using the buttons.
whDm.endAfterStart: End time must be after start time. Pick another time.
whDm.genericSaveFailedRetry: Could not save. Please try again.

reminder.upcoming: Reminder: the game starts in 15 minutes! {place}, starts at {time}
